title: Cloud Guard Problem: VCN Security List Port SSH
description: Detects Cloud Guard reporting problem: VCN_Security_List_Port_SSH.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Cloud Guard Problems' or 'Log Source' = 'OCI Cloud Guard Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Cloud Guard Logs') and (('Problem Name' = 'VCN_Security_List_Port_SSH'))
